Fri May 22 DPS NOT yet emailed at Sat 7:03 AM run (normally arrives ~7:38 AM PT next day) - friPending stays true. Toast IQ 'Group - Fri May 22' marketing email present but carries no sales figures. (2) Sling: FRESH Sat May 23 daily report arrived 7:02 AM PT - 10 emp, 52.50 hrs, 0 OT, 0 uncovered, 2 off. Isael Salvador Narciso (Cook) STILL shows malformed open shift, now 4:54A-4:54A (was 4:57A) - verify in Sling. Fri May 22 moved to prior-day slot. (3) Google Ads: LIVE scrape (ads.google.com/aw/campaigns, cust 343-687-4835), data date May 22 - Cost $24.39, Impr 7,056, Clicks 117 (read directly), CTR 1.66%, Avg CPC $0.21, 0 conversions. Card deltas: impr +1,630, conv -11.00, cost +$1.84. Campaign 'Limited by budget' ($23.37/day, opt score 85%). 2 report emails/24h, no disapprovals. (4) Yelp: LIVE scrape (biz.yelp.com) - last 30d 53.6k ad impr (87% share), 736 page visits from ads (73%), 178 leads from ads (79%), 646 ad clicks. Billing May 1-22: $594.95 spend, $1.14 CPC, $3.99 CPL. 12mo leads: 840 ads / 773 organic (52% ad share). Bonus budget not surfaced on dashboard. (5) TripAdvisor: no new analytics@hm2.tripadvisor.com email in last 24h. (6) GitHub PAT: 200 OK. NOTE: Google Ads account balance/payment + reservations + reviews carried forward (not data sources for this run).

toast.source: Toast 229 W Montecito DPS for Thu May 21 (arrived Fri May 22 7:39 AM PT) is still the latest. Fri May 22 DPS not yet delivered at Sat 7:03 AM run (normal ~7:38 AM).
toast.note: Thu May 21 (latest Toast DPS): Net $4,853.40 / Gross $5,027.60, -8.5% net vs same day last week (Thu May 14 $5,301.55). Labor 14.4% ($700.72), down from 17.1% SDLW. Discounts $174.20, voids $102.50 (UP 122.8% vs $46 SDLW - check). Refunds $0. Guests ~196 / orders ~118 ($24.76/guest, $41.13/check) DERIVED from avg-check division. Revenue split: Dining Room $3,258.60 (67%) / Bar $1,594.80 (33%). Fri May 22 DPS still not arrived at Sat 7:03 AM run (carried, friPending=true).
